Brand Identity

Precision.
Authority.
Sustainability.

ZENNARA Property & Facility Management is East Africa's premier eco-responsible property and facility management company — combining the authority of CBRE and JLL with deep Kenyan market expertise and a genuine commitment to green building operations.

The brand draws from the original logo's bold black typography and warm gold house icons, elevated with an eco green palette that signals sustainability, ESG readiness, and smart building management.

28 May 2026
Mr. John KamauGeneral Manager · Acacia Business Park, Westlands
RE: Property & Facility Management — Eco Compliance Review Q2 2026

Dear Mr. Kamau,

We are pleased to present our quarterly eco-compliance report for Acacia Business Park. ZENNARA's dedicated facility management team has achieved a 22% reduction in energy consumption this quarter through our smart building monitoring systems and LED retrofit programme.

Waste diversion rates now stand at 78%, exceeding our contractual target of 70%. Our water management audit identified three additional efficiency interventions which we are ready to implement upon your approval.

Yours faithfully,

Protus Nyamweya

Managing Director · ZENNARA Property & Facility Management

Registered OfficeWestlands, Nairobi, Kenya

Client Acquisition

Proposal Template

Property & Facility Management Proposal
🌿 Eco-Responsible · Green Certified FM Services
Premium Management
& Eco Facility Services for
A comprehensive proposal for full-service property management and eco-responsible facility operations.
Prepared for:
Acacia Property Holdings Ltd
🌿 Eco Certified
Executive Summary

ZENNARA Property & Facility Management is East Africa's premier eco-responsible property and facility management partner. This proposal outlines our comprehensive FM services designed to optimise building performance, reduce operational costs, and deliver sustainable, measurable results.

🌿 Our Eco Promise
All ZENNARA FM contracts include our standard eco package: monthly energy reporting, waste diversion targets, green-certified cleaning products, and an annual sustainability audit. We target a minimum 15% reduction in energy consumption in Year One.
Service Packages
Essential
3% mgmt fee
• Preventive maintenance
• Cleaning services
• Basic FM operations
• Monthly reporting
Premium
8% mgmt fee
• All Essential
• Full FM operations
• 24/7 maintenance
• Security coordination
• 🌿 Eco compliance
Corporate
Custom
• All Premium
• Dedicated FM director
• Smart building systems
• 🌿 Green certification

Developer & Partner Handoff

Technical Brief

Complete specification for website developers and technology partners. Colours, fonts, integrations, sitemap, and build timeline in one place.

Brand Colours — CSS Variables
Colour Tokens
Copy these CSS variables directly into your project root. Never hard-code colour values — always reference variables.
--zennara-black#080808
--zennara-charcoal#1C1C1C
--zennara-gold#C9A030
--zennara-gold-light#E2B84A
--zennara-eco#2D7A4F
--zennara-eco-light#3BAA6A
--zennara-eco-pale#A8D5B8
--zennara-platinum#888888
Typography — Google Fonts
Font Stack
Import both fonts in the HTML head. Cormorant Garamond for display and headlines. Barlow Condensed for labels and UI. Barlow for body copy.
Display / HeadlinesCormorant Garamond
Weights (display)300, 400, 600, 700
UI Labels / NavBarlow Condensed
Weights (UI)400, 600, 700, 800
Body / DescriptionsBarlow
Fallbackserif / sans-serif

Recommended Build
Fast, SEO-optimised, and developer-friendly stack supporting the dark luxury aesthetic and eco data integration.
Next.js 14
Framework
Tailwind CSS
Styling
TypeScript
Language
Sanity CMS
Content
Vercel
Hosting
Framer Motion
Animations
Required Integrations
Third-Party Services
All integrations listed below are required for full website functionality. Obtain API keys before development begins.
💬
WhatsApp Business API
Live chat widget — client and tenant enquiries
Required
🗺️
Google Maps API
Property location maps and directions
Required
📧
Mailchimp / Resend
Lead capture and email notifications
Planned
🌿
Eco Data Dashboard
Live energy, waste, and carbon metrics
Phase 2
Page Structure
Website Sitemap
Recommended page architecture for SEO and developer clarity. All pages are server-side rendered.
/ HomeHero + Stats + Services
/servicesAll FM service pages
/portfolioManaged properties grid
/ecoEco FM + live dashboard
/aboutTeam + history
/portalClient login + dashboard
/contactWhatsApp + form + map
/blogFM insights + eco news
Build Timeline
Development Phases
Recommended 8-week build. Eco dashboard is Phase 2. Adjust for team size and client portal complexity.
Wk 1–2
Setup, design system, font/colour tokens, component library
Wk 3–4
Homepage, services pages, managed portfolio with CMS
Wk 5–6
Client portal, maintenance dashboard, WhatsApp + Maps
Wk 7
Eco FM page, eco data widgets, SEO meta tags, mobile QA
Wk 8
Testing, performance audit, Vercel deployment, handoff
Brand Standards

Brand Guidelines

01
Logo Usage
  • Always display the ZENNARA wordmark as uploaded — bold black type with dual gold house icons
  • Dark surfaces: white/inverted logo. Light surfaces: original colour logo. Eco contexts: white logo with eco badge
  • Minimum digital size: 120px wide. Minimum print: 25mm wide
  • Never stretch, rotate, recolour, outline, or add effects to the logo
02
Colour Rules
  • Zennara Black (#080808) — primary background for all premium surfaces
  • Zennara Gold (#C9A030) — primary accent, used sparingly and with authority
  • Zennara Green (#2D7A4F) — reserved exclusively for eco and sustainability contexts
  • Never use gold on gold, green on green, or swap the eco and gold roles
03
Typography Rules
  • Cormorant Garamond for all display, headline, and property name copy
  • Barlow Condensed for all labels, navigation, buttons, and UI text
  • Barlow for all body copy, descriptions, and running text
  • Never use Arial, Calibri, Inter, or system fonts in branded materials
04
Tone of Voice
  • Authoritative but approachable — speak as a premium management partner
  • ZENNARA is a Property & Facility Management company — describe only as a management and operations partner
  • Lead with client benefit, then company capability
  • No hyphens in headings. No exclamation marks in formal copy
05
Eco Identity
  • Zennara Green (#2D7A4F) is used exclusively for eco, sustainability, and green certification contexts
  • The eco badge (🌿 Eco Certified) appears on all marketing materials and client documents
  • Never use eco green as a general design accent — it carries specific environmental meaning
  • All property reports must include a green performance section with energy and waste metrics
06
Services Identity
  • ZENNARA provides: Property Management, Facility Management, Building Maintenance, Cleaning, Security Coordination, Inspections, and FM Consultancy
  • The Eco FM service line is a core differentiator — always prominently featured
  • Client Portal is the correct term for the digital client interface
  • ZENNARA materials cover only management and operations — never property transactions
